zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱延续整理
zh.content:
当前价格持续运行于9.20下方并跌破SMA20均线，整体结构偏弱，短线进入窄幅震荡整理阶段，空头略占优势但动能有限

MACD柱值维持在-0.033附近，空头动能仍在释放但未显著扩大，均线系统呈压制状态，价格缺乏上行动力短线反弹仍需量能确认

下方支撑位关注9.15及9.10区域，若跌破可能延伸下探；上方阻力集中在9.18与9.28附近，突破SMA20后方可转强

短线建议以区间交易为主，在9.15-9.18附近低吸高抛，若放量突破9.28可顺势追多，跌破9.10则应控制风险并等待确认信号

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD continues to trade with a mildly bearish tone, hovering near 9.16 after failing to sustain momentum above the 9.18 intraday high. Price action remains below the 20-day simple moving average at 9.276, which signals weakening short-term sentiment and suggests sellers still control the broader direction. The narrow daily range indicates consolidation, but the inability to reclaim higher levels keeps downside pressure intact. Unless buyers push the pair decisively above the moving average, rallies may continue to face resistance.

Momentum indicators also favor caution in the near term. The MACD reading remains negative at -0.0339, reflecting lingering bearish momentum despite the relatively flat 24-hour performance. While the RSI(14) is unavailable, current market structure implies weak buying strength and limited speculative demand. The small daily percentage decline shows that volatility has compressed, often a precursor to a stronger directional move. Traders should therefore monitor breakout conditions carefully rather than relying on the current sideways movement.

From a technical perspective, immediate support appears near 9.15, aligning closely with the session low. A breakdown beneath this area could expose additional downside toward the psychologically important 9.00 region. On the upside, resistance is forming around 9.28 near the SMA(20), followed by a stronger barrier near 9.40 where prior selling activity may re-emerge. A successful move above these levels would improve short-term sentiment and potentially shift momentum back toward neutral territory.

Short-term traders may prefer a defensive approach until confirmation of trend reversal appears. Conservative participants could wait for a sustained close above 9.28 before considering bullish positions, while aggressive traders may look for quick range-based opportunities between support and resistance. Risk management remains essential given the compressed volatility environment. If AVAX falls below 9.15 with increasing volume, bearish continuation trades may become more attractive than attempting to buy the dip prematurely.
